falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows invalidates the bottom pattern match; the 79% similarity to bottom_2024_aug requires holding above that structural support, and failure here confirms this is not a repeat of that bottoming formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 implies contained panic; VIX spiking above 35 indicates genuine systemic stress rather than a controlled washout, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal which assumes orderly de-risking without panic contagion

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40 basis points from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety bid of this magnitude signals recession/depression pricing rather than soft-landing macro rotation; the current UNKNOWN verdict assumes ambiguous growth data, and this would confirm hard-landing regime change

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
